metadata.description: Claude Code QA skills for authenticated browser testing, workflow generation, Playwright conversion, and multi-persona audits.

plugins.name: qa-skills
plugins.description: QA testing pipeline with 6 personas (smoke, UX, adversarial, security, performance, mobile) — generate workflows, convert to Playwright tests, run interactively or in CI. Includes per-project role profiles and global authenticated browsing for external services.
